_comment: USP-only approved offer language for home_services vertical. Built from uploaded one-pager (Ugly Sweater Party LLC). No external business context (MyPalette, MetaSill, artist, creator, gallery) authorized without cross_vertical_approval.json bridge.

offer_framing.opening_angle: Denver-area workflow improvement firm reaching out to home service companies
positioning_statements: faster follow-up and cleaner operations for growing home service companies
practical human-reviewed workflow systems that fit the way the business already runs
owner-led team helping roofers, HVAC, and plumbing teams move faster without giant rebuilds
offer_framing.call_to_action: brief call to discuss how workflow improvement could serve your team
offer_framing.offer_context: call to explore fit — no cost, no commitment

pain_point_mapping.slow_follow_up: new leads come in but follow-up is slow or inconsistent
pain_point_mapping.slipping_through_cracks: estimate requests, appointments, and handoffs slip through the cracks
pain_point_mapping.manual_re_entry: staff losing time re-entering information, chasing updates, and managing inbox clutter
pain_point_mapping.office_chaos: missed follow-ups, admin bottlenecks, and messy office-to-field handoffs

target_client_profile.firm_type: owner-led and lean home service teams
target_client_profile.firm_characteristics: enough incoming calls, estimate requests, and scheduling activity to feel the strain of missed follow-up, admin bottlenecks, and messy office-to-field handoffs
target_client_profile.service_area: Denver, Boulder, Longmont, and surrounding areas

process_steps.1_diagnose: Review current workflow, friction points, and where follow-up or handoff is breaking down
process_steps.2_design: Recommend the highest-value fix, confirm scope, and shape the plan around how the team actually works
process_steps.3_build_support: Implement the solution, hand it off cleanly, and support the team for 2 weeks so it sticks

offer_a.name: Home Service Workflow Audit
offer_a.price_rule: never mention $350 in cold outreach — price only if prospect asks
includes: review of current workflow and handoff gaps

offer_b.name: Follow-Up + Admin Starter Build
offer_b.price_rule: never mention $2,500 in cold outreach — price only if prospect asks

A_tier_named: workflow improvement for your Denver home service team
question about your team's follow-up and operations process
C_tier_generic: Denver home service company workflow improvement opportunity
HVAC, roofing, plumbing workflow review — Denver
home service workflow fit call — Denver

body_language_rules.footer_context: founder-led implementation partner for faster follow-up, cleaner handoffs, and less manual admin in home service businesses

cta_language.primary_cta: reply to book a free 10-minute discovery call
cta_language.call_recipient: reply to the email to schedule with the co-founder
cta_language.barrier_removal: no cost, no commitment — exploratory call only
cta_language.fee_credit_note: 50% of discovery/audit fee applies toward a build

why_us_nuance: practical workflow fixes with human review built in — office and field team can move faster without a giant custom rebuild
author: human_operator_from_uploaded_one_pager
compliance_disclaimer: operational workflow support only; not financial, legal, mortgage, or licensed professional advice. Results vary by business and context.
